description: Checklist de perfil laboral que el lector de CV intenta completar abans del matching.

question.ca: Com et dius?
question.en: What is your full name?

question.ca: Quin és el teu correu electrònic?
question.en: What is your email address?

question.ca: Quin és el teu telèfon de contacte?
question.en: What is your contact phone number?

question.ca: A quina ciutat vius actualment?
question.en: Which city do you currently live in?

question.ca: Tens LinkedIn o portafolis professional?
question.en: Do you have a LinkedIn profile or professional portfolio?

question.ca: Busques jornada completa, parcial o totes dues?
question.en: Are you looking for full-time, part-time or both?

question.ca: Tens disponibilitat per fer pràctiques?
question.en: Are you available for an internship?

question.ca: Quin tipus de rol descriu millor el teu perfil?
question.es: ¿Qué tipo de rol describe mejor tu perfil?
question.en: Which role best describes your profile?

question.ca: Quants anys d’experiència tens en aquest àmbit?
question.es: ¿Cuántos años de experiencia tienes en este ámbito?
question.en: How many years of experience do you have in this field?

question.ca: Et consideres júnior, mid o sènior?
question.en: Would you describe yourself as junior, mid-level or senior?

question.ca: En quin sector tens més experiència?
question.en: Which sector do you have the most experience in?

question.ca: Quines han estat les teves responsabilitats principals?
question.en: What have your main responsibilities been?

question.ca: Quines són les teves principals habilitats tècniques?
question.en: What are your main technical skills?

question.ca: Quines eines o tecnologies domines?
question.en: Which tools or technologies do you use confidently?

question.ca: Quines tres competències personals et defineixen millor?
question.es: ¿Qué tres competencias personales te definen mejor?
question.en: Which three soft skills describe you best?

question.ca: Tens alguna certificació que no aparegui al CV?
question.es: ¿Tienes alguna certificación que no aparezca en el CV?
question.en: Do you have any certifications not listed on your résumé?

question.ca: Quin és el nivell d’estudis més alt que has completat?
question.es: ¿Cuál es el nivel de estudios más alto que has completado?
question.en: What is the highest level of education you have completed?

question.ca: Quina titulació tens?
question.en: Which qualification or degree do you hold?

question.ca: En quin centre vas estudiar?
question.en: Where did you study?

question.ca: Quina és la teva especialització?
question.en: What is your specialization?

question.ca: Quan vas finalitzar els estudis?
question.en: When did you finish your studies?

question.ca: Estàs cursant alguna formació actualment?
question.en: Are you currently studying or training?

question.ca: Quins idiomes parles?
question.en: Which languages do you speak?

question.ca: Quin nivell tens de cada idioma?
question.en: What is your level in each language?

question.ca: Quin rol de treball estàs buscant?
question.en: Which role are you looking for?

question.ca: Quins altres rols també consideraries?
question.en: Which other roles would you consider?

question.ca: En quin sector t’agradaria treballar?
question.en: Which sector would you like to work in?

question.ca: Vols continuar en el teu sector o canviar?
question.es: ¿Quieres continuar en tu sector o cambiar?
question.en: Do you want to remain in your sector or change careers?

question.ca: Què és el més important per a tu en la pròxima feina?
question.es: ¿Qué es lo más importante para ti en tu próximo empleo?
question.en: What matters most to you in your next job?

question.ca: Quin radi de desplaçament acceptes?
question.en: How far are you willing to commute?

question.ca: Prefereixes treball presencial, híbrid o remot?
question.en: Do you prefer on-site, hybrid or remote work?

question.ca: Acceptaries traslladar-te?
question.en: Would you be willing to relocate?

question.ca: Estaries disposat o disposada a viatjar per feina?
question.es: ¿Estarías dispuesto o dispuesta a viajar por trabajo?
question.en: Would you be willing to travel for work?

question.ca: Quin tipus de contracte prefereixes?
question.en: Which contract type do you prefer?

question.ca: Tens alguna preferència d’horari?
question.en: Do you have a preferred schedule?

question.ca: Quan podries començar?
question.en: When could you start?

question.ca: Quin rang salarial esperes?
question.en: What salary range are you expecting?

question.ca: Què valores més: salari, estabilitat, aprenentatge, flexibilitat o promoció?
question.es: ¿Qué valoras más: salario, estabilidad, aprendizaje, flexibilidad o promoción?
question.en: What do you value most: salary, stability, learning, flexibility or promotion?

question.ca: Prefereixes una empresa gran, una pime o una startup?
question.es: ¿Prefieres una gran empresa, una pyme o una startup?
question.en: Do you prefer a large company, SME or startup?

question.ca: T’agrada treballar individualment o en equip?
question.en: Do you prefer working independently or in a team?

question.ca: Què voldries aprendre en la teva pròxima feina?
question.es: ¿Qué te gustaría aprender en tu próximo empleo?
question.en: What would you like to learn in your next job?

question.ca: Quin seria el teu entorn de treball ideal?
question.es: ¿Cuál sería tu entorno de trabajo ideal?
question.en: What would your ideal work environment be?
